actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,
       kh.phone,
       kh.fax,
       kh.country,
       kh.address,
       kh.ssdq,
       kh.ssgs,
       kh.cslxr
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.company_name=[客户寄样.客户名称]) 
ORDER BY kh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT bjsheet.sid,
       bj.ywry,
       bj.dateis,
       bj.bjry,
       bjsheet.mjdj1,
       bjsheet.jg,
       bjsheet.bjhh
FROM bj,bjsheet 
WHERE (bj.rid=bjsheet.pid) 
  AND (bj.customer=[客户寄样.客户名称]) 
ORDER BY bjsheet.sid desc LIMIT 20

actions.expression:
select * from (SELECT cjcp.yytp,0 sort_id
FROM cjcp 
WHERE (cjcp.cpbh=[客户寄样.产品清单.产品编号]) 
union all
SELECT zscp.yytp,1 sort_id
FROM zscp 
WHERE (zscp.cpbh=[客户寄样.产品清单.产品编号])) a order by sort_id desc limit 1

actions.expression:
SELECT jyglcp.sid,
       jyglcp.cpbh,
       jyglcp.zwpm,
       jyglcp.ywpm,
       jyglcp.cpgge,
       jyglcp.bzhfsh,
       jyglcp.bzyq,
       jyglcp.wxrl,
       jyglcp.jldw,
       jyglcp.nhwx,
       jyglcp.jg,
       jyglcp.tj,
       jyglcp.mz,
       jyglcp.jz,
       jyglcp.czyy,
       jyglcp.jysj,
       jyglcp.ydh,
       jyglcp.ypsl,
       jyglcp.sjr,
       jyglcp.mygb,
       jyglcp.ssdq,
       jyglcp.bz,
       jyglcp.hwbh,
       jyglcp.hhbz,
       jyglcp.zwbz,
       jyglcp.wyzd,
       jyglcp.ypsx,
       jyglcp.bjry,
       jyglcp.nhrl,
       jyglcp.gyry,
       jyglcp.jsr,
       jyglcp.ywbm,
       jyglcp.khmc,
       jyglcp.yytp,
       jyglcp.hgbm,
       jyglcp.krhh,
       jyglcp.krtm,
       jyglcp.rid
FROM jygl,jyglcp 
WHERE (jygl.rid=jyglcp.pid) 
  AND (jygl.ydh like concat("%",[客户寄样.运 单 号],"%")) 
  AND (jygl.jyrq=[客户寄样.寄样日期]) 
  AND permission('客户寄样') 
ORDER BY jyglcp.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT bjsheet.sid,
       bjsheet.bjhh,
       bjsheet.zwpm,
       bjsheet.ywpm,
       bjsheet.cpgge,
       bjsheet.bzhfsh,
       bjsheet.bzyq,
       bjsheet.wxrl,
       bjsheet.nhrl,
       bjsheet.jldw,
       bjsheet.nhwx,
       bjsheet.jg,
       bjsheet.tj,
       bjsheet.mz,
       bjsheet.jz,
       bjsheet.czyy,
       bjsheet.bjry,
       bjsheet.khhh,
       bjsheet.krtm,
       bjsheet.mjdj1,
       bjsheet.cpfl,
       bjsheet.yjfl,
       bjsheet.ejfl,
       bjsheet.hgbm
FROM bj,bjsheet 
WHERE (bj.rid=bjsheet.pid) 
  AND (bj.bj_id=[客户寄样.报价单号]) 
  AND permission('客户报价') 
ORDER BY bjsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
select * from (select
    cjcp.cpbh,
    cjcp.zwpm,
    cjcp.yytp,
    cjcp.ywpm,
    cjcp.customer,
    cjcp.krhh,
    cjcp.krtm,
    cjcp.jldw,
    cjcp.rmbdj,
    cjcp.hgbm,
	  cjcp.bzrl,
    cjcp.nhrl,
    cjcp.nhwx,
    cjcp.bzhfsh,
    cjcp.bzyq,
	 	cjcp.mjfob,
		cjcp.bztj,
    cjcp.mxmz,
    cjcp.mxjz,
    cjcp.tgxy,
    cjcp.bjry,
    cjcp.cpfl,
    cjcp.yjfl,
    cjcp.ejfl,
    cjcp.cpgg,
		3 sort_id,
    [客户寄样.寄样日期] jysj, 
    [客户寄样.运 单 号] ydh,
    [客户寄样.贸易国别] mygb,
    [客户寄样.所属地区] ssdq
from cjcp
where cjcp.cpbh=[客户寄样.产品清单.产品编号]
union ALL
select
    zscp.cpbh,
    zscp.zwpm,
    zscp.yytp,
    zscp.ywpm,
    zscp.customer,
    zscp.krhh,
    zscp.krtm,
    zscp.jldw,
    zscp.rmbdj,
    zscp.hgbm,
	  zscp.bzrl,
    zscp.nhrl,
    zscp.nhwx,
    zscp.bzhfsh,
    zscp.bzyq,
		zscp.mjfob,
		zscp.bztj,
    zscp.mxmz,
    zscp.mxjz,
    zscp.tgxy,
    zscp.bjry,
    zscp.cpfl,
    zscp.yjfl,
    zscp.ejfl,
    zscp.cpgg,
		1 sort_id,
    [客户寄样.寄样日期] jysj, 
    [客户寄样.运 单 号] ydh,
    [客户寄样.贸易国别] mygb,
    [客户寄样.所属地区] ssdq
from zscp
where zscp.cpbh=[客户寄样.产品清单.产品编号]
union ALL
select
    bjsheet.cpbh,
    bjsheet.zwpm,
    bjsheet.yytp,
    bjsheet.ywpm,
    bjsheet.customer,
    bjsheet.khhh krhh,
    bjsheet.krtm,
    bjsheet.jldw,
    bjsheet.mjdj1 rmbdj,
    bjsheet.hgbm,
	  bjsheet.wxrl bzrl,
    bjsheet.nhrl,
    bjsheet.nhwx,
    bjsheet.bzhfsh,
    bjsheet.bzyq,
		bjsheet.jg mjfob,
		bjsheet.tj bztj,
    bjsheet.mz mxmz,
    bjsheet.jz mxjz,
    '' tgxy,
    bjsheet.bjry,
    bjsheet.cpfl,
    bjsheet.yjfl,
    bjsheet.ejfl,
    bjsheet.cpgg,
		2 sort_id,
    [客户寄样.寄样日期] jysj, 
    [客户寄样.运 单 号] ydh,
    [客户寄样.贸易国别] mygb,
    [客户寄样.所属地区] ssdq
from bjsheet
where bjsheet.bjhh=[客户寄样.产品清单.产品编号]) a order by sort_id asc

caption: 客户寄样

view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (module1="客户资料")

SELECT kdgs.gsmc,kdgs.SID
FROM kdgs
ORDER BY kdgs.SID ASC
